---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new skill, improvement, or capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the situation where you wished BCOS could do something it can't.

## Proposed solution

How you'd like it to work. Be as specific or as vague as you want.

## What type of addition is this?

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Improvement to existing skill
- [ ] New template or example
- [ ] New document type support
- [ ] Methodology improvement
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Other

## Who would benefit?

Which roles or use cases would this help? (e.g., founders, ops teams, agencies)

## Anything else?

Additional context, screenshots, links to related discussions.
